creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 168424
Update libc++ in base to 3.8.0 release

As a follow-up to the import of clang 3.8.0 into base, I would like to update libc++ in base to 3.8.0 too.  Please do an exp-run with this patch, to see if there are any port regressions on head.

The patch should apply cleanly on head r297052, using:

xzcat update-libcxx-380-1.diff.xz | patch -p1 -f -F0 -E
